discount_type.description: Whether the discount is a percentage or a fixed dollar amount

discount_value.description: The discount amount (e.g. 10 for 10% or $10 off)

max_uses.description: Maximum number of times this code can be used, leave blank for unlimited

used_count.description: Number of times this code has been used so far

valid_until.description: Last date this code can be used, leave blank for no expiry

is_active.description: Whether this code can currently be redeemed
